description: LLM Chunker output. Never copy text — locate everything with loc. A post-processor resolves all loc coordinates into text to produce 03_resolved.json for Stage 4.

loc.description: Line range in 01_normalized pages[].text split by \n. line_start is the first line (1), line_end is the last (inclusive) = len(lines).

skip_pages.description: Page numbers (1-based) that contain only navigational content — TOC, index, revision history, cover page. All loc coordinates in sections and spec_items must fall outside these pages.

section_number.description: Heading number verbatim (e.g. '3.1') if present. Null otherwise.

item_id.description: Spec item ID if the heading has one (e.g. 'SYS-NAV-HDR-001'). Null otherwise.

title.description: Heading text verbatim. Only field in this schema where copying is allowed — needed to build the section tree before loc resolution.

parent_number.description: item_id of the immediate parent. Null if root.

loc.description: Full heading block. Use line_end > line_start if the heading wraps lines.

spec_items.description: One entry per requirement ID occurrence. Duplicates are preserved — emit both with their respective loc. The analyzer detects the conflict.

item_type.description: (1) Check if an explicit attribute in the item states it, or (2) the item_id prefix clearly implies it. Map to the closest enum value. Null in all other cases.

classification.description: (1) Check if an explicit attribute in the item states it, or (2) the item_id prefix clearly implies it. Map to the closest enum value. Null in all other cases.

source.description: Layout the item was extracted from. 'table' signals potential extraction noise — Stage 4 should treat content with lower confidence.

parent_number.description: section_number of the immediate containing section.

loc.description: Full requirement block, from the item_id line to the last line before the next item or heading.

extra_attrs.description: Any other explicitly labeled sub-fields not covered above. Keys: snake_case of the label as written. Values: loc. Do not invent — only emit if the label is present in the text.

flags.description: Uncertainty flags the LLM can attach to an item (e.g. 'ambiguous_boundary', 'possible_table_noise').
